src: Powerful modern math library for PHP: Features descriptive statistics and regressions; Continuous and discrete probability distributions; Linear algebra with matrices and vectors, Numerical analysis; special mathematical functions; Algebra
ja: PHP向けの強力なモダン数学ライブラリ：記述統計と回帰分析、連続・離散確率分布、行列とベクトルによる線形代数、数値解析、特殊数学関数、代数を搭載。
